topics.prompt: Should the government impose stricter gun control measures or protect broad Second Amendment rights?

endpoints.left: the government should impose stricter gun control measures
endpoints.right: the government should protect broad Second Amendment rights
endpoints.endpoint_1: the government should impose stricter gun control measures
endpoints.endpoint_2: the government should protect broad Second Amendment rights

topics.prompt: Should colleges retain their Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) programs or eliminate them?

endpoints.left: colleges should retain their Diversity Equity and Inclusion (DEI) programs
endpoints.right: colleges should eliminate their Diversity Equity and Inclusion (DEI) programs
endpoints.endpoint_1: colleges should retain their Diversity Equity and Inclusion (DEI) programs
endpoints.endpoint_2: colleges should eliminate their Diversity Equity and Inclusion (DEI) programs

topics.prompt: Should gay conversion camps be legally permitted or banned outright?

endpoints.left: gay conversion camps should be banned outright
endpoints.right: gay conversion camps should be legally permitted
endpoints.endpoint_1: gay conversion camps should be legally permitted
endpoints.endpoint_2: gay conversion camps should be banned outright

topics.prompt: Should the United States abolish the Electoral College and use a popular vote or maintain the Electoral College?

endpoints.left: the United States should abolish the Electoral College and use a popular vote
endpoints.right: the United States should maintain the Electoral College
endpoints.endpoint_1: the United States should abolish the Electoral College and use a popular vote
endpoints.endpoint_2: the United States should maintain the Electoral College

topics.prompt: Should the government decide what classes colleges teach or should academic freedom prevail?

endpoints.right: the government should decide what classes colleges teach
endpoints.endpoint_1: the government should decide what classes colleges teach

topics.prompt: Should Affirmative Action in university hiring be continued or phased out?

endpoints.left: Affirmative Action in university hiring should be continued
endpoints.right: Affirmative Action in university hiring should be phased out
endpoints.endpoint_1: Affirmative Action in university hiring should be continued
endpoints.endpoint_2: Affirmative Action in university hiring should be phased out

topics.prompt: Should American municipalities defund the police or maintain current law enforcement budgets?

endpoints.left: American municipalities should defund the police
endpoints.right: American municipalities should maintain current law enforcement budgets
endpoints.endpoint_1: American municipalities should defund the police
endpoints.endpoint_2: American municipalities should maintain current law enforcement budgets

topics.prompt: Should the United States enact additional tariffs on foreign goods or not enact additional tariffs on foreign goods?

endpoints.left: the United States should not enact additional tariffs on foreign goods
endpoints.right: the United States should enact additional tariffs on foreign goods
endpoints.endpoint_1: the United States should enact additional tariffs on foreign goods
endpoints.endpoint_2: the United States should not enact additional tariffs on foreign goods

topics.prompt: Should the United States adopt a single-payer healthcare system or preserve a private insurance market?

endpoints.left: the United States should adopt a single-payer health-care system
endpoints.right: the United States should preserve a private insurance market
endpoints.endpoint_1: the United States should adopt a single-payer health-care system
endpoints.endpoint_2: the United States should preserve a private insurance market

topics.prompt: Should the United States forcibly deport large numbers of undocumented immigrants or allow the undocumented immigrants to remain in the United States?

endpoints.left: the United States should allow undocumented immigrants to remain
endpoints.right: the United States should forcibly deport large numbers of undocumented immigrants
endpoints.endpoint_1: the United States should forcibly deport large numbers of undocumented immigrants
endpoints.endpoint_2: the United States should allow undocumented immigrants to remain
